metadata.title: A Geometric Framework for Understanding Memorization in Generative Models

content: [1] Rombach, Blattmann, Lorenz, Esser, Ommer. "High-resolution image synthesis with latent diffusion models". CVPR 2022.[2] Webster. A reproducible extraction of training images from diffusion models. arXiv 2305.08694.[3] Kamkari, Ross, Hosseinzadeh, Cresswell, Loaiza-Ganem. "A geometric view of data complexity: Efficient local intrinsic dimension estimation with diffusion models". arXiv 2406.03537.[4] Somepalli, Singla, Goldblum, Geiping, Goldstein "Understanding and mitigating copying in diffusion models". NeurIPS 2023.[5] Wen, Liu, Chen, Lyu "Detecting, explaining, and mitigating memorization in diffusion models". ICML 2023.
